icons.text: The abillity to use your smartphone, tablet, or computer to access your account means your files follow you everywhere.
2-factor authenfication and user-controlled encryption are just a couple of the security features we allow to help secure your files.
Securely share files and folders with friends, family and colleagues for live collaboration. No email attachments required
Whether you're sharing holdiays photo or work documents, Fylo has you covered allowing for all file types to securely stored and shared
